name: v0-cli
description: CLI for creating and iterating on websites with v0.dev

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/v0.cjs --external:open && grep -v '^#!' dist/v0.cjs > dist/v0.tmp && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/v0.tmp > dist/v0.cjs && rm dist/v0.tmp && chmod +x dist/v0.cjs
